description: Single preset entrypoint for the SCOPE Image Orchestrator skill. Runtime route presets, route keyword maps, optimizer guides, external prompt-pattern notes, and import summaries live here to avoid scattered preset files.

global_rules.negative_anchor: Negative: no minors, no nudity, no sexual acts, no watermark.
global_rules.short_prompt_english_only: Keep final production prompt in compact clean English.
text_principles: Prefer concrete camera/light/material controls before abstract adjectives.
Use 2-4 distinct scene anchors and avoid long safety-flavored filler words.
Keep hard constraints in negative_prompt, not in main descriptive tone.
Add route-specific detail if the request is generic.
global_rules.model_comparison_note: Prompt optimization and repair should stay compact, deterministic, and easy to parse.
global_rules.external_library_usage: When route_preset_brief.external_patterns is present, use it as distilled inspiration: keep camera/layout/material controls, but do not copy long third-party prompt text verbatim. Prefer compact route-specific production English.

portrait.route_hint: editorial / lifestyle portrait, real face identity, concrete setting, capture realism, skin/hair/fabric microtexture, not beauty-filter glamour
portrait.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 2:3 vertical editorial portrait, adult subject based on: {subject}. Scene first: {style_blocks}. {camera_phrase}. Real skin micro-texture, natural face asymmetry, realistic neck and shoulder anatomy, subtle under-eye variation, tiny flyaway hairs, visible fabric texture. Relaxed practical pose with realistic hands and gentle body shift.
portrait.camera_phrase: 85mm portrait lens, practical indoor/window light, natural falloff
portrait.negative: Negative: no cartoon look, no beauty-filter face, no plastic skin, no repeated random text, no watermark.
booster_lines: one concrete scene anchor from the request and 2 nearby props
micro texture details on skin and hair only, not over-posed filters
distinct face geometry and hair silhouette per variant
micro texture on skin/hair/fabric without plastic smoothing
avoid over-posed stock-photo posture
style_blocks: real camera capture: 35mm/50mm/85mm, phone candid, CCD/film influence only when requested
one everyday location anchor with 2-3 props, not an empty studio unless requested
natural pose asymmetry: imperfect hand placement, shoulder weight, tiny expression imbalance
external_patterns: soft airy 35mm portrait with natural window light and mild film grain
iPhone candid realism with imperfect crop, natural face geometry, visible pores and flyaway hair
black mist / low-contrast indoor portrait, practical lamp glow, subtle under-eye variation
editorial lifestyle portrait with environment-first composition and realistic fabric folds

magazine.route_hint: fashion / editorial magazine cover, layout-first, one masthead, 2-3 short cover lines, clean typography hierarchy, model integrated with text
magazine.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 2:3 high-fashion magazine cover, adult model based on: {subject}. Compose by layout-first with masthead, clean short cover lines, small issue badge and one issue number. Keep text density concise and readable. {light_phrase}. Model and scene are integrated with strong composition depth.
magazine.camera_phrase: cinematic still look with subtle paper-like contrast
magazine.light_phrase: cool ambient plus warm key, print-quality contrast control
magazine.negative: Negative: no repeated text paragraphs, no unreadable gibberish, no fake logos unless requested, no watermark, no minors, no messy text clutter.
booster_lines: prioritize layout hierarchy over extra adjectives
one readable model-over-masthead composition
external_patterns: masthead at top, subject overlaps part of masthead, 2-3 readable cover lines on grid
one circular badge or issue mark, short serif/sans hierarchy, no paragraph clutter
cover lines frame the body rather than floating randomly; text zones must stay readable
premium print contrast, paper-like finish, controlled color palette and negative space
composition_patterns: 2:3 vertical cover, model center or side-offset, clear top masthead zone
short text blocks: masthead, subtitle, feature line, small issue marker

poster.route_hint: cinematic/key-art poster, title-zone discipline, one hero focus, practical atmosphere, layered foreground-midground-background
poster.fallback_prompt: Cinematic 2:3 movie poster key art based on: {subject}. Hero silhouette and core prop in center-forward, readable title zone, short tagline, compact credits block. Build practical atmospheric background with real light direction and depth layers.
poster.camera_phrase: cinematic composition with layered foreground-midground-background and controlled depth
poster.light_phrase: cold/warm split palette with controlled haze and practical reflections
poster.negative: Negative: no repeated title, no fake logos unless requested, no unreadable clutter, no random text, no watermark.
booster_lines: keep title and graphic zones clear and short
no poster texture pseudo-noise
external_patterns: one hero silhouette or face focus, one core prop, practical rain/fog/dust/flare lighting
clear title zone in lower third or center, one short tagline, compact credits block
poster composition has graphic negative space and depth layers, not random cinematic clutter
genre palette: cyberpunk neon rain, desert signal dust, noir station red, fantasy gate fog
composition_patterns: foreground texture, midground hero, background world cue, readable typography layer
title and credits occupy dedicated zones; keep wording short and legible

interior.route_hint: architectural interior visualization, lens/geometry/material first, straight verticals, true room scale, realistic lighting
interior.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic architectural interior visualization of: {subject}. Eye-height {camera_phrase}, straight verticals, realistic circulation path, proper room geometry and furniture scale. Materials show wood grain, fabric weave, stone veining, and metal reflections. Lighting is realistic practical, with gentle bounce and scene depth.
interior.negative: Negative: no warped furniture, no impossible perspective, no melted materials, no extra doors/windows, no people unless requested, no watermark.
booster_lines: one scale anchor every 2-3 meters in scene
materials should be physically plausible with shadow and reflections
scale anchors every few meters
straight vertical lines and realistic furniture footprints
external_patterns: eye-height 24-28mm lens, straight verticals, believable room circulation and furniture scale
material separation: wood grain, stone veining, fabric weave, brushed metal, glass reflections
one architectural style anchor plus 3-5 physical objects for scale, no impossible geometry
practical daylight or lamp glow with soft bounce, not over-rendered glossy showroom lighting
composition_patterns: camera position and room function first, then materials, furniture, light, small props
keep walls, floor, ceiling and openings physically consistent

product.route_hint: commercial product still life / ad creative, one hero object, material behavior, controlled reflections, clean background
product.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic commercial product still life, hero object from: {subject}. Single main object with controlled reflections and realistic shadow. Clean background with minimal helpers for scale. Camera style: {camera_phrase}.
product.camera_phrase: single-product studio or window-light style, moderate close-up control
product.negative: Negative: no duplicate hero object, no warped logo/label, no random label text, no clutter, no watermark.
booster_lines: keep 1 hero object and 2–3 scale elements
preserve material boundary between object and base
external_patterns: single hero product on simple base, controlled softbox/window reflection, realistic contact shadow
macro material detail: glass transparency, brushed steel, leather grain, condensation, stitching, crumbs
advertising composition with negative space and 2-3 supporting props, no duplicate hero object
label/text should be blank or exact and short; avoid warped logos and random label text
composition_patterns: hero product first, camera angle second, material/reflection third, props last
clear silhouette and contact shadow; no clutter around the main object

bathroom.route_hint: real smartphone mirror composition in modern hotel/compact apartment bathroom, private lifestyle feel, natural intimacy, not cover/magazine layout
bathroom.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 9:16 real smartphone mirror composition, adult woman in modern hotel or compact apartment bathroom, based on: {subject}. Half-body or three-quarter composition, one hand holding phone, one hand with soft natural adjustment to face, hair, or neckline. Slight 26mm smartphone lens edge distortion and imperfect mirror crop for realism. Scene includes tiled surfaces, glass shower edge, folded towels, sink counter, chrome fixtures, skincare bottles, natural mirror reflections.
bathroom.camera_phrase: 26mm equivalent smartphone perspective, slightly asymmetrical handheld angle, mild sensor grain
style_blocks: soft warm vanity bulb and ambient indoor fill
subtle, natural intimacy, no studio cover mood
modern hotel or compact apartment bathroom
soft warm vanity bulb and neutral indoor fill
quiet girlfriend POV / private lifestyle snapshot
half-body or three-quarter reflected composition with phone visible
bathroom.negative: Negative: no stock-photo posture, no influencer/advertising pose, no wet or transparent shirt, no sexual poses, no watermark, no minors.
booster_lines: include practical mirror edge in frame
small hand, shoulder and collar asymmetry
realistic fabric folds and collar behavior
natural skin texture, no beauty-filter face
include practical mirror edge and phone crop asymmetry
small shoulder, collar, hand and leg asymmetry
real bathroom material separation: ceramic, chrome, glass, cotton
external_patterns: 9:16 phone mirror composition, slight 26mm edge distortion, imperfect crop, mirror edge visible
phone partly covers cheek/face; one hand adjusts glasses, hair, collar, or face naturally
bathroom props: cream tile, glass shower edge, folded towels, chrome faucet, sink counter, skincare bottles
opaque oversized white Oxford shirt or homewear with realistic cotton folds and collar behavior
sensor grain, mirror highlights, warm vanity bulbs, natural skin texture without beauty-filter face
composition_patterns: do not use magazine cover strategy or typography
prioritize lived-in smartphone realism over polished studio lighting
route_keywords: 生活方式服饰人像摄影

cosplay.route_hint: live-action character/character styling poster, preserve iconic anchors, premium real-material translation, adult real human texture, not anime/CGI
cosplay.fallback_prompt: Photorealistic 2:3 live-action character/character styling poster, adult-inspired, preserve iconic anchors from: {subject}. Real human face structure and realistic hair strands. Costume becomes premium real materials with visible seams, embroidery, leather, metal, and silk layers. Practical mixed lighting, natural lens imperfection, natural body sway and subtle hand asymmetry.
cosplay.camera_phrase: practical mixed light, subtle handheld imperfection
cosplay.negative: Negative: no anime render, no CGI skin, no cheap costume materials, no random text, no explicit sexual pose, no watermark, no minors.
booster_lines: anchor one hairstyle/color and one signature accessory first
prioritize costume weight, seams, and fabric tension
external_patterns: translate character into real couture/costume materials: seams, embroidery, leather, metal, silk, fabric tension
keep one hairstyle/color anchor and one signature accessory before adding atmosphere
practical mixed light, natural lens imperfection, real pores, eyelashes, hair strands, believable jawline
hero pose with natural shoulder imbalance and hand asymmetry, not rigid 3D render pose
composition_patterns: 2:3 vertical live-action character poster, one hero action, practical set background
costume weight and material boundaries must read clearly at first glance

external_prompt_sources.note: Source prompt libraries were reviewed as public inspiration and distilled; URLs and raw prompt bodies are omitted from the public preset library.

optimizer_guides.prompt_presets_md:
# Prompt Presets

Use route presets as compact inspiration only. Keep final prompts concise, concrete, and suitable for the selected route. Do not copy third-party prompt bodies verbatim.
optimizer_guides.prompt_optimizer_compact_md:
# Prompt Optimizer Compact Guide

Return a short production prompt plus concise negative constraints. Prefer visible controls: subject, setting, composition, lighting, material, camera/crop, and exclusions.
optimizer_guides.prompt_optimizer_engineering_md:
# Prompt Optimizer Engineering Guide

Classify the request, preserve user constraints, choose one route, synthesize a compact prompt, and avoid long nested JSON-like prose unless a structured output is explicitly requested.
optimizer_guides.external_prompt_patterns_md:
# External Prompt Pattern Notes

Public prompt examples were used only as high-level inspiration. Keep distilled route controls and avoid redistributing source prompt text.

source_prompt_cache_summary.note: Public prompt examples were distilled into compact route controls. Full third-party prompt bodies are intentionally not included.
source_prompt_cache_summary.policy: Do not add verbatim third-party prompt libraries or private local caches to this repository.

open_source_notice: Most preset ideas are distilled from public internet prompt libraries and examples. They were filtered, rewritten, normalized into route-level controls, and are not intended as verbatim prompt copies.
image_model_prompting_influence: explicit scene + subject + lens + material order
short constraints, long constraints go to negative
if text is required, specify exact hierarchy and keep visible wording short
for unstable endpoints, keep the final prompt under 900-1100 characters and avoid nested JSON-like prompt prose

core_idea: replace mood words with measurable controls
split prompt into scene, lens, material, and composition blocks
anchor style with practical physical details first
distilled_from_infinite_canvas_sources: treat the prompt as a physical shot plan, not as keyword spam
separate subject, environment, camera, material, lighting, and post-processing controls
for human scenes, add ordinary capture imperfections before beauty adjectives
for commercial scenes, keep one primary hero and 2-3 supporting anchors
